name: dressai-super
description: DressAI + GetdressAI — web (static + cheap AI proxy), mobile (Expo), monetized API (Stripe + affiliate)

scripts.verify: npm run test:web && node --check dressai-api/server.js && node scripts/verify-services.mjs
scripts.verify:live: npm run test:web && node --check dressai-api/server.js && node scripts/verify-services.mjs --live --web
scripts.verify:live:strict: npm run test:web && node --check dressai-api/server.js && node scripts/verify-services.mjs --live --web --strict
